# Wine

## Tags
alcohol, beverage, bar, drink, glass, sommelier, vineyard, winery

## Categories
food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/wine)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Wine;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Wine { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
